mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.paper_id,t.title, e.duration, e.total_score, e.allow_retake, e.max_attempt, e.show_result FROM exam e left join test_paper t on e.paper_id = t.id WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam (activity_id, paper_id, duration, total_score, allow_retake, max_attempt, show_result, create_time) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{paperId}, #{duration}, #{totalScore}, #{allowRetake}, #{maxAttempt}, #{showResults},#{createTime})
